디모데후서 1:1.content: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ through the will of God, according to the promise of the life which is in Christ Jesus,

디모데후서 1:2.content: to Timothy, my beloved child: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.

디모데후서 1:3.content: I thank God, whom I serve as my forefathers did, with a pure conscience. How unceasing is my memory of you in my petitions, night and day

디모데후서 1:4.content: longing to see you, remembering your tears, that I may be filled with joy;

디모데후서 1:5.content: having been reminded of the sincere faith that is in you, which lived first in your grandmother Lois, and your mother Eunice, and, I am persuaded, in you also.

디모데후서 1:6.content: For this cause, I remind you that you should stir up the gift of God which is in you through the laying on of my hands.

디모데후서 1:7.content: For God didn’t give us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.

디모데후서 1:8.content: Therefore don’t be ashamed of the testimony of our Lord, nor of me his prisoner; but endure hardship for the Good News according to the power of God,

디모데후서 1:9.content: who saved us and called us with a holy calling, not according to our works, but according to his own purpose and grace, which was given to us in Christ Jesus before times eternal,

디모데후서 1:10.content: but has now been revealed by the appearing of our Savior, Christ Jesus, who abolished death, and brought life and immortality to light through the Good News.

디모데후서 1:11.content: For this I was appointed as a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher of the Gentiles.

디모데후서 1:12.content: For this cause I also suffer these things. Yet I am not ashamed, for I know him whom I have believed, and I am persuaded that he is able to guard that which I have committed to him against that day.

디모데후서 1:13.content: Hold the pattern of sound words which you have heard from me, in faith and love which is in Christ Jesus.

디모데후서 1:14.content: That good thing which was committed to you, guard through the Holy Spirit who dwells in us.

디모데후서 1:15.content: This you know, that all who are in Asia turned away from me, of whom are Phygelus and Hermogenes.

디모데후서 1:16.content: May the Lord grant mercy to the house of Onesiphorus, for he often refreshed me, and was not ashamed of my chain,

디모데후서 1:17.content: but when he was in Rome, he sought me diligently and found me

디모데후서 1:18.content: (the Lord grant to him to find the Lord’s mercy in that day); and in how many things he served at Ephesus, you know very well.
